name: 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets
about: 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets are a highly effective medication used in the treatment of liver, kidney, or thyroid cancer. These tablets are formulated in India and come in a tablet dosage form. The tablets have a normal fermentation smell and can be stored in a dry place for 12-24 months. The active ingredient in these tablets is Sorafenib, which works by blocking the action of certain proteins that encourage cancer cell growth.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets?
faq.a: The recommended dosage for these tablets is usually 2 tablets taken twice a day, or as directed by your doctor.

faq.q: How long does it take for 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets to start working?
faq.a: The time it takes for these tablets to start working may vary from person to person. It is important to continue taking the medication as prescribed by your doctor.

faq.q: Are there any side effects of using 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets?
faq.a: Yes, some common side effects of using these tablets include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, fatigue, and skin reactions. However, these side effects may vary from person to person.

faq.q: Can 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets be taken with food?
faq.a: These tablets can be taken with or without food. However, it is important to follow your doctors instructions regarding the best way to take the medication.

faq.q: Can 200 MG Sorafenib Tablets be used in the treatment of other types of cancer?
faq.a: These tablets are primarily used in the treatment of liver, kidney, or thyroid cancer. However, your doctor may prescribe them for the treatment of other types of cancer as well.
